view.embed_blocked: This webpage cannot be embedded in an iframe.
view.bundle_failed: Failed to load the webpage bundle.
editor.ratio_hint: The webpage basecard supports fixed-ratio and free-expand display modes.
editor.ratio_fixed_hint: Keeps a fixed 16:7 height-to-width viewport and scrolls inside the window.
editor.ratio_free_hint: Expands with webpage height, capped at 20 times the width.
editor.ratio_free_current: Current display ratio: free expand (max 20x width)
editor.mode_hint: Choose the webpage source mode first, then provide the matching link or upload a webpage bundle.
editor.url_hint: Entering a valid URL refreshes automatically. Switching from a bundle to a URL also clears the previous bundle reference automatically.
editor.url_placeholder: Enter a webpage URL, for example https://example.com
editor.bundle_hint: The ZIP root must contain index.html, or contain a single top-level folder whose root contains index.html. The editor will extract the bundle into the card root directory.
editor.bundle_upload_action: Drag a ZIP file here, or click to choose one.
editor.invalid_url: Enter a valid http(s) or file URL.
editor.import_unsupported: The current host does not provide webpage bundle import.
editor.import_failed: Failed to import the webpage ZIP package.
editor.clear_failed: Failed to remove previous webpage bundle resources.
